WITH LindaCity AS (
    SELECT city_code
    FROM Student
    WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'
),
Distances AS (
    SELECT 
        s.StuID,
        s.Fname,
        s.LName,
        COALESCE(dd.distance, 0) AS distance_to_linda
    FROM Student s
    CROSS JOIN LindaCity lc
    LEFT JOIN Direct_distance dd ON 
        (s.city_code = dd.city1_code AND lc.city_code = dd.city2_code)
        OR (s.city_code = dd.city2_code AND lc.city_code = dd.city1_code)
    WHERE NOT (s.Fname = 'Linda' AND s.LName = 'Smith')
)
SELECT Fname, LName
FROM Distances
WHERE distance_to_linda = (SELECT MAX(distance_to_linda) FROM Distances);

WITH coauthor_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        al2.author_id, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT al2.paper_id) AS coauthored_paper_count
    FROM Author_list al1
    JOIN Author_list al2 ON al1.paper_id = al2.paper_id
    WHERE al1.author_id = (SELECT author_id FROM Author WHERE name = 'Mckeown , Kathleen')
        AND al2.author_id != al1.author_id
    GROUP BY al2.author_id
)
SELECT 
    a.author_id, 
    a.name, 
    cc.coauthored_paper_count
FROM coauthor_counts cc
JOIN Author a ON cc.author_id = a.author_id
WHERE cc.coauthored_paper_count = (SELECT MAX(coauthored_paper_count) FROM coauthor_counts)
ORDER BY a.name;

WITH mckeown AS (
    SELECT author_id 
    FROM Author 
    WHERE name = 'Mckeown , Kathleen'
),
her_papers AS (
    SELECT paper_id 
    FROM Author_list 
    WHERE author_id = (SELECT author_id FROM mckeown)
),
coauthor_counts AS (
    SELECT al.author_id, COUNT(*) AS paper_count
    FROM Author_list al
    JOIN her_papers hp ON al.paper_id = hp.paper_id
    WHERE al.author_id != (SELECT author_id FROM mckeown)
    GROUP BY al.author_id
    ORDER BY paper_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT a.name
FROM Author a
JOIN coauthor_counts cc ON a.author_id = cc.author_id;

2139:

    c.client_id, 
    c.client_details 
FROM Clients c
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Meetings m WHERE m.client_id = c.client_id)
   OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Invoices i WHERE i.client_id = c.client_id);

2142:

2143:
SELECT 
    c.client_id AS id,
    c.sic_code,
    c.agency_id
FROM 
    Clients c
WHERE 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Meetings m WHERE m.client_id = c.client_id) = 1
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Invoices i WHERE i.client_id = c.client_id);
2144:
SELECT c.client_id, c.sic_code, c.agency_id
FROM Clients c
WHERE 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Meetings m WHERE m.client_id = c.client_id) = 1
    AND
    EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Invoices i WHERE i.client_id = c.client_id);
2125:
SELECT 
    c.client_id, 
    COUNT(m.meeting_id) AS number_of_meetings
FROM 
    Clients c
LEFT JOIN 
    Meetings m ON c.client_id = m.client_id
GROUP BY 
    c.client_id;
2095:
SELECT invoice_status
FROM Invoices
GROUP BY invoice_status
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
1903:
SELECT p.Name
FROM Shipment s
JOIN Planet p ON s.Planet = p.PlanetID
GROUP BY s.Planet, p.Name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
2066:
SELECT 
    a.agency_id, 
    COUNT(c.client_id) AS client_count
FROM Agencies a
LEFT JOIN Clients c ON a.agency_id = c.agency_id
GROUP BY a.agency_id
ORDER BY a.agency_id;
2131:
SELECT 
    m.meeting_id, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT sm.staff_id) AS number_of_staff
FROM Meetings m
LEFT JOIN Staff_in_Meetings sm ON m.meeting_id = sm.meeting_id
GROUP BY m.meeting_id;
2132:
SELECT 
    m.meeting_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT sm.staff_id) AS staff_count
FROM 
    Meetings m
LEFT JOIN 
    Staff_in_Meetings sm ON m.meeting_id = sm.meeting_id
GROUP BY 
    m.meeting_id
ORDER BY 
    m.meeting_id;
2145:
SELECT 
    m.start_date_time,
    m.end_date_time,
    c.client_details,
    s.staff_details
FROM 
    Meetings m
    JOIN Clients c ON m.client_id = c.client_id
    LEFT JOIN Staff_in_Meetings sim ON m.meeting_id = sim.meeting_id
    LEFT JOIN Staff s ON sim.staff_id = s.staff_id
ORDER BY 
    m.start_date_time;
2073:
SELECT 
    c.client_details,
    s.staff_details
FROM 
    Clients c
LEFT JOIN 
    Staff s ON c.agency_id = s.agency_id;
2146:
SELECT 
    M.start_date_time,
    M.end_date_time,
    C.client_details,
    S.staff_details
FROM Meetings M
JOIN Clients C ON M.client_id = C.client_id
JOIN Staff_in_Meetings SIM ON M.meeting_id = SIM.meeting_id
JOIN Staff S ON SIM.staff_id = S.staff_id
ORDER BY M.start_date_time, S.staff_details;
